description: A U.S. Department of Labor designed infographic on a dark navy background. The upper half is a photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark suit and red tie, smiling and pointing toward the viewer while standing on the field of a packed sports stadium (blurred crowd behind him). Overlaid in large white serif type (italic 'The Great American' + bold 'REVIVAL!') is the headline 'The Great American REVIVAL!'. Below is a white rounded-rectangle data card titled in bold 'Jobs in March Grow Faster than Expected Under President Trump', subtitle 'Change in private sector employment, thousands.' The card shows a two-bar chart: a tall red bar labeled '+186k' for 'Actual' versus a short dark-blue bar labeled '+65k' for 'Expected', with the note 'CEA analysis of BLS data.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom. The technique pairs a triumphant/celebratory presidential image with a favorable jobs statistic to claim the economy beat forecasts (tweet mocks 'PANICANS' who 'were wrong'). Target audience: American workers and the administration's base, crediting the president with strong job growth.
notable_text: The Great American REVIVAL! | Jobs in March Grow Faster than Expected Under President Trump | Actual +186k | Expected +65k
